---
title: Configuration
description: Configuration reference
---

# Configuration

## Overview

Describe how the project is configured.

## Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `option_a` | `string` | `""` | Description of option A |
| `option_b` | `bool` | `false` | Description of option B |

## Example

```yaml
option_a: hello
option_b: true
```
